title: Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
